hero.title: AI-optimized engineering
hero.subtitle: Bring together experts, AI, and transparent metrics to deliver concrete outcomes.

dantexWay.label: The Dantex Way
dantexWay.title: Impact focus
dantexWay.deliveryBody: Combine engineering teams with copilots, automated QA, and predictive analytics to cut rework and accelerate results.
dantexWay.impactTitle: We measure value delivered, commit by commit
dantexWay.impactBody: Every code change is evaluated for technical depth and business impact so your project moves forward with purpose.
dantexWay.impactAlt: Metrics panel and city in motion

howItWorks.kicker: A transparent process to measure impact
howItWorks.title: How it works

step1.title: Every commit is analyzed by our AI model
step1.body: It scans each change to understand what was modified and why.
step1.commitLine: Feat: add lazy loading to dashboard widgets
step1.author: María

step2.title: Architecture, tests, tickets, and release notes are considered
step2.body: The model cross-references each commit with architecture, related tasks, testing results, and documentation.

step3.title: Measurement and improvement with impact signals
step3.body: Each iteration is evaluated with clear metrics to reduce rework and prioritize what matters to the business.

whatYouGet.title: What you get
items: Spot hidden heroes on the team
Speed and quality benchmarks across teams
Clarity on ROI—from effort to impact

items.quote: Leadership is always there to help us with everything. The technical team is also very strong and committed to our projects.
items.author: Bruno Tadayoshi Mendes Doy

items.quote: Collaboration was smooth from day one: clarity, speed, and flawless execution. They feel like an extension of the team.
items.author: Technology leader

items.quote: Excellent technical depth and focus on results. Every delivery came with clear impact visibility and impeccable communication.
items.author: Product Director
